abilities.name: Sonic Resonance
abilities.narrationHints: Focused sound waves that can shake, shatter, resonate with, or gently move physical objects. Visible as shimmering pressure ripples in the air.
abilities.description: Project focused resonant waves to move, shake, or shatter matter at a distance.
abilities.notFor: Fine manipulation (it pushes, shakes, shatters — it cannot pick a lock or thread a needle); silent work (using it is always audible); affecting light or minds.

tree.name: Focused Push
tree.grants: Move, rattle, or knock over objects up to a person's weight within ~10 paces; crack brittle material (pottery, thin ice, old mortar); knock a weapon from an unready hand.
tree.cannot: No effect through solid stone; nothing heavier than a person; no sustained force — each use is a pulse.

tree.name: Standing Wave
tree.grants: Sustained pressure — hold a door shut or force it, pin a light object to a wall, shatter dense material (green wood, cheap iron fittings); shape the pulse around one ally.
tree.cannot: Cannot lift (only push); two targets max; fails in heavy interference without a check.

tree.name: Resonant Break
tree.grants: Find and exploit a structure's resonant frequency: collapse a wall section, shatter quality steel, stun everyone in a small room (nonlethal); precise enough to break one link of a chain.
tree.cannot: Not lethal by design — the field limits output near living tissue; exhausting (double energy) in Radiant territory.

abilities.name: Echo Sense
abilities.narrationHints: Sound-based perception like echolocation — hearing shapes, movement, and hollow spaces through walls and darkness.
abilities.description: Perceive your surroundings through sound reflection — even through walls, smoke, or darkness.
abilities.notFor: Reading emotion, intent, or words on a page; anything at true distance (beyond ~50 paces); seeing color or light-based detail.

tree.name: Near Echo
tree.grants: Map bodies and large objects through one wall or in darkness within ~10 paces; count people; sense sudden movement behind you.
tree.cannot: No fine detail (a face, a small tool); one wall only; loud environments blind it.

tree.name: Carried Echo
tree.grants: Range ~30 paces and two walls; distinguish individuals you know by gait and breath; overhear muffled speech as rhythm and tone (not words); sense hollow spaces and hidden voids.
tree.cannot: Still cannot resolve words reliably; running water scrambles it.

tree.name: Deep Listening
tree.grants: Hear actual words through barriers at ~20 paces; read a building's whole layout in a minute of stillness; detect the sub-sound of active nanite fields and Precursor machinery.
tree.cannot: Requires stillness — cannot deep-listen while moving or fighting; Precursor tech notices being listened to.

abilities.name: Resonant Shield
abilities.narrationHints: A standing-wave barrier of interference patterns that deflects projectiles and dampens incoming force.
abilities.description: Raise a standing-wave barrier that dampens incoming force.
abilities.notFor: Offense of any kind; protecting against gas, liquid, or light-based attacks; concealment (the barrier visibly shimmers).

tree.name: Flicker Guard
tree.grants: A heartbeat's barrier that deflects one projectile or blunts one blow; enough warning-shimmer to interrupt an ambush.
tree.cannot: One impact then gone; only protects you; cannot hold against sustained force.

tree.name: Held Chord
tree.grants: Sustain the barrier several breaths; cover yourself plus one adjacent ally; shrug off thrown stones, arrows, tool-swings.
tree.cannot: Walking pace only while held; heavy impacts (a charging animal) break it and cost you the energy anyway.

tree.name: Bulwark Harmony
tree.grants: Room-corner dome for up to four people, held a full scene if unmolested; turns crossbow bolts and a Radiant lance's first strike; can be tuned to let allies' actions pass outward.
tree.cannot: Immobile once anchored; collapses instantly if you take a hit inside it; useless against the ground shaking.

abilities.name: Harmonic Voice
abilities.narrationHints: Layered vocal overtones that soothe fear, ease tension, and lend weight to spoken words. Subtle — listeners feel it more than hear it.
abilities.description: Weave calming overtones into your speech, easing fear and hostility in those who hear you.
abilities.notFor: Domination or command (it soothes and carries, never compels); deception (a lie sung in harmony still reads as a lie); working on the deaf or on machinery.

tree.name: Calming Undertone
tree.grants: Ease fear and hostility in a conversation-sized group; steady a panicking person or animal; make your words land as sincere (when they are).
tree.cannot: Cannot change anyone's mind — only their temperature; breaks if you or an ally acts aggressively.

tree.name: Carrying Tone
tree.grants: Project clearly to a crowd or across a river without shouting; lace a negotiation with patience — hotheads get one reflexive pause before doing something irreversible.
tree.cannot: The pause is a heartbeat, not a hold; crowds beyond ~50 resist; costs double against trained Radiant negotiators.

tree.name: Concord
tree.grants: Bring a room to genuine willingness to listen — feuding parties will hear one full argument out; quiet a mob's edge; sung over the wounded, grants deep restorative sleep.
tree.cannot: Cannot make anyone agree; one use per gathering — people feel it the second time and harden.
